Interface IRasterLoader

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster

ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control data loading.

[Guid("DDAF901C-90E5-4CD5-845E-7B19CC57B629")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterLoader
